# Task: Implement Retry Decorator

## Objective

Implement an exponential backoff retry decorator according to the specification
in `spec.md`.

## Files

- `spec.md` — detailed specification for the retry decorator
- `test_retry.py` — test suite that your implementation must pass
- `retry.py` — create this file with your implementation

## Requirements

- Read `spec.md` carefully and implement exactly what it describes
- All tests in `test_retry.py` must pass
- The implementation must be in `retry.py`
